programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E10 - Landlocked Salmon & Chaga
programme.desc: Daniel joins lifelong friends on a frozen lake to fish below the hard water for landlocked Atlantic salmon, and also searches high in the trees for a chaga mushroom.

programme.title: E6 - Drew and Cindy With Tom
programme.desc: Friends and bandmates Cindy and Drew look for a Yukon property with mountain views, rehearsal space and a workshop.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E12 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

E9 - Mary Lynn (Part A)

programme.title: E5 - Killer Mom Or Innocent Parent?
programme.desc: A mother of four is accused of killing her 11-week-old baby and is now facing life in prison. The prosecution alleges the infant was violently shaken—but the defence insists this isn't what happened.

programme.title: E5 - Kerry Lynn Dalton
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene 'Melanie' May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. programme.title: Baogu Produces -Furious Clash
programme.desc: “The Furious” Director Kenji Tanigaki, Producer Frank Hui and leading actor Xie Miao are invited to share their filming experiences. Frank reveals the best fighter agreed unanimously upon by five martial arts masters in the film. Xie talks about how he used punches to express the character's ruthlessness! Kenji also unveils the hardships behind creating one of the major scenes with 'five-person melee battle' in the film.

programme.title: I Love Hong Kong 2013
programme.desc: Hong Kong of the 1970s - a place bustling with opportunities and riches! The earnest Sung befriended the crafty Ha and the latter also helped Song found his first job: a waiter at a Chinese Teahouse. The boss of the Teahouse is a kind man, who has an array of quirky characters as his staff. The colorful characters attracted an interesting patronage, making it a happening place for the community. Fate has it that both Sung and Ha fell for the same girl: May who is from a well-to-do family. It's face off between the geek and the smooth-talker. While romance is blossoming between May and Song, May's best friend Yuen is a gutsy girl who insisted that bad boys are attractive and only have eyes for Ha. Decades past and Sung weathered many changing times: crash of stock market; era of mass-migration and more... While Sung remained steadfast, guarding the teahouse, continuing to serve his loyal patrons and providing jobs for his long-serving staff, the fast-thinking Ha now owns a bu

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: Ten months after the murder of Yan (Tony Leung), Ming (Andy Lau) is relegated to the backseat of mundane office work, pending internal investigation. Exhausted mentally and physically, Ming is running on empty, but he is convinced that he can reverse his fortune in no time. Meanwhile, a new star has emerged in the police force. Hardly forty years old, Wing (Leon Lai) has already risen to the top echelon thanks to his illustrious track record...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Furious Clash
programme.desc: “The Furious” Director Kenji Tanigaki, Producer Frank Hui and leading actor Xie Miao are invited to share their filming experiences. Frank reveals the best fighter agreed unanimously upon by five martial arts masters in the film. Xie talks about how he used punches to express the character's ruthlessness! Kenji also unveils the hardships behind creating one of the major scenes with 'five-person melee battle' in the film.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E114 - The Condiment Incident/The Dolphin For The Job
programme.desc: Bianca and Jim smuggle goods onto the sub, but when Cyril discovers their side hustle and opens a jar of pickles, it contaminates the ship’s ecosystem. Their only hope: 'Operation Lollipop' to seal that jar!

programme.title: E6 - Free Cake/First Day/Access Denied/Picking Up Margaret/Expert Or Liar
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby try to seize an opportunity to eat a piece of cake, and it comes when they learn that Skips' birthday is coming soon.

programme.title: E448 - The Joker's On You/Tv Knight 10
programme.desc: In order to escape from the Joker, the Titans try different comedy routines to make him laugh.

programme.title: E81 - Dog Hotel/Dance Lessons
programme.desc: With no place to stay while their cave gets fumigated, the Bears book a night at a hotel for dogs.

programme.title: E130 - The Amadáin/The Burger
programme.desc: Gumball vows to wear a shell and partake in strange Fitzgerald traditions, in order to help Penny get through a tense family birthday party with ease.

programme.title: E124 - Brick 3000/Mo's Amazing Talent
programme.desc: M.Brick is really stressed! He has to do a presentation about technology, but he's completely lost… Mo and Sam need to do something, or M.Brick will remain stressed forever.

programme.title: E23 - Jurassic Bean/Caring Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes in search of wildlife but he isn’t expecting to see anything prehistoric!

programme.title: E19 - Rose's Room/Beach Party/Steven and the Stevens
programme.desc: Steven's desire for some alone unlocks a new room in the Temple that answers his every wish.

programme.title: E9 - Grand Sport Supercharger
programme.desc: There is only one thing missing to make a Grandsport the top dog Corvette on the road: a Supercharger. Can the girls find one?

programme.title: E9 - Jeff Allen Vs The Humble Mechanic
programme.desc: Jeff Allen faces off with Humble Mechanic as motor world talent goes head-to-head in a viral video competition to test their motor knowledge and win the 'mystery box.'

programme.title: E6 - Datsun Street Racer
programme.desc: The Z car is the Grandfather of the 'fast and furious' street racing scene, the car which kicked off the Japanese sportscar story.

programme.title: E12 - 49 Ford Rust To Royalty
programme.desc: A while back, a customer asked Bill to rebuild a rusty '49 Ford truck as a gift for her dad.

programme.title: E4 - Corvette Gold
programme.desc: Jeff and the sons find Corvette gold and get a lesson in fibreglass fabricating from Steve in the process.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: Uim Motosurf World Championship
programme.desc: MotoSurf racing was established in the Czech Republic back in 2012. In its quite short history, the MotoSurf racing has spread all over the world. Since 2019, the sport has been officially recognized by the UIM (Union International Motonautique) - recognized by IOC (International Olympic Committee) since 2010.

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E24 - Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: E41 - Mums And Dads
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: E17 - Andy And The Smooth Coated Otters
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer to Singapore on a global adventure to help guide a smooth-coated otter family back to the safety of a nearby river.

programme.title: E18 - Andy And The Hippos

programme.title: Transcending Happiness
programme.desc: The show features couples, parent and child, and friends talking about the different forms of happiness that they have discovered together throughout their life.

programme.title: Great Traverse Taiwan: Crossing The Ultimate Sky Route
programme.desc: Adventurer Tanaka Yoki embarks on a new challenge. In Taiwan-an island the size of Kyushu with over 200 peaks exceeding 3,000 meters, including Yushan, taller than Mount Fuji-he traverses from east to west along perilous high-altitude routes. Beyond the hardships awaits a breathtaking world of vast cloud seas and sweeping mountain panoramas, reminding him of his own smallness. As his journey moves beyond Japan, a new chapter of his adventure unfolds. What lies beyond the finish line?

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: With Mother

programme.title: Great Traverse Taiwan: Crossing The Ultimate Sky Route
programme.desc: Adventurer Tanaka Yoki embarks on a new challenge. In Taiwan-an island the size of Kyushu with over 200 peaks exceeding 3,000 meters, including Yushan, taller than Mount Fuji-he traverses from east to west along perilous high-altitude routes. Beyond the hardships awaits a breathtaking world of vast cloud seas and sweeping mountain panoramas, reminding him of his own smallness. As his journey moves beyond Japan, a new chapter of his adventure unfolds. What lies beyond the finish line?

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.desc: Lindsay Brun, Remi-Pierre Paquin and Vanessa Pilon have invited Marie-Soleil Dion and Louis-Olivier Mauffette to join them, in a chateau, no less. Wines from the Fragments vineyard to quench their thirst and meat from the Brylee farm to ensure no-one goes hungry!

programme.title: E10 - How Do You Set Up And Solve A Multiplication?
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: E48 - Thermometer
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E46 - Sugar Glider
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: E6 - The Power Of Love
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14:2025-2026
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14:2025-2026

programme.title: Basik:2026
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche:2025-2026
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: La Cuisine Marocaine
programme.desc: Juicy fruits, refined herbs, colorful spices... From Fez to Marrakech, Morocco offers a rich culinary playground. In this kingdom of flavors where recipes are passed down from generation to generation, share the tables of families, local markets and starred restaurants.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion:2025-2026
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: E11 - Kodjo Koublenou (Togo)
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: E9 - East Region 2: A Surprise For Dwayne
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host Dwayne Johnson. In these Eastern division battles we see Michelle Lewis go up against Dasha Kuret and Andrew Hanus take on Ryan Seenberg. They will compete on obstacles such as Launch Pad, Chain Linked, Kick Out and Over the Edge. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: In the town of Stepford, Nicole Kidman and Matthew Broderick find that all the women are perfect - a little too perfect.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after Jurassic Park, mathematician Ian Malcolm has to venture into a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: E5 - The Spiffanos
programme.desc: After Adam borrows a pencil from Phinneas Porpoise, he finds himself indebted to the Spiffies. To pay back the debt, Adam agrees to make a secret 'delivery', but Jake tags along, and things quickly go south.

programme.title: E6 - Little Mermonkey
programme.desc: Herman the Hermit Crab takes up residence in Adam's locker. Adam and Jake attempt to return herman to his underwater lair, but Herman relentlessly clings to his new home.

programme.title: E7 - Diplomatic Insanity
programme.desc: Adam spearheads the United Species, an animal version of the United Nations. Upset that his pal is spending more time with the United Species than with him, Jake determines to bring the organization down.

programme.title: E14 - Substitute Sweetheart
programme.desc: When a new substitute teacher arrives at CDMS, Jake meets his first love and his first broken heart.

programme.title: E16 - Citronella Solution
programme.desc: Jake discovers he has THE GIFT, and can predict disaster before it strikes!

programme.title: Life According To Sam
programme.desc: This documentary explores the world of Sam Berns and the relentless pursuit of a treatment by his parents to save their son from Progeria, a fatal genetic condition.

programme.title: E1 - Part 1
programme.desc: An HBO Original Documentary where kids share their thoughts on the environment of this changing earth.

programme.title: E3 - Part 3
programme.desc: Through a lyrical mix of science, animation and music, Saving My Tomorrow urges children to take action by highlighting ways in which kids can do their part to save the planet.

programme.desc: Four years after Jurassic Park, mathematician Ian Malcolm has to venture into a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.
PHOENIX FOCUS : Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E432
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.
PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Frontline of Hate: A True Account of Global Extreme Nationalism
programme.desc: Far-right forces are rising significantly worldwide. From al-Qaeda (AQ) in the Middle East to extremists within the German Special Forces Command (KSK), and neo-Nazi militants colluding with each other on the Ukrainian battlefield, right-wing extremism is infiltrating military and police systems, using the professional skills of veterans and active-duty soldiers to plan and carry out terrorist attacks and attempt to overthrow governments…
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E432
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E426
programme.desc: TALK WITH WORLD LEADERS: Talk With World Leaders reveals compelling insights into key international figures in the fields of politics, industry, business, science and the arts, giving Chinese audiences a closer look at the world leaders.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E154
programme.desc: Through the captivating stories presented in We Are One, the viewers can fully immerse themselves in the narratives and witness the genuine emotions that arise between humans and animals. These emotions are rooted in love and go beyond mere boundaries, showcasing the remarkable power of love in forging meaningful connections.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Frontline of Hate: A True Account of Global Extreme Nationalism
programme.desc: Far-right forces are rising significantly worldwide. From al-Qaeda (AQ) in the Middle East to extremists within the German Special Forces Command (KSK), and neo-Nazi militants colluding with each other on the Ukrainian battlefield, right-wing extremism is infiltrating military and police systems, using the professional skills of veterans and active-duty soldiers to plan and carry out terrorist attacks and attempt to overthrow governments…

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Frontline of Hate: A True Account of Global Extreme Nationalism
programme.desc: Far-right forces are rising significantly worldwide. programme.title: E432
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E5 - Fast Lane
programme.desc: Mechanics and a gang of robbers race to get money hidden in Banner's car.

programme.title: E8 - Slaves Of Las Vegas
programme.desc: The death of a young woman leads Grissom and Catherine to investigate the underground world of Las Vegas' fetish clubs, while Warrick and Sara investigate a shooting.

programme.title: E13 - Jeannie, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Tony, Jeannie and Roger wind up playing gin.

programme.title: E14 - Never Put A Genie On A Budget
programme.desc: Jeannie's budget saves money, but almost loses Tony's job.

programme.title: E2 - Remember Nothing
programme.desc: When Xena protects the temple of the Fates, they grant her wish for a new life. As she sees her loved ones tormented by warlords she eliminated in her original life, her temptation to fight for right increases.

programme.title: E4 - Part 4
programme.desc: The story begins in 1894, when Baron Pierre de Courbetin announces his intention to stage the first Olympic games of the Modern Era within two years in Athens.

programme.title: E6 - King Of The Beach
programme.desc: A muscle builder who resembles the Hulk vies for the title of ``King of the Beach.''.

programme.title: E7 - Higher Education
programme.desc: When Steve gets an A in history, a class with a steep grading curve, Brandon studies with him and learns that Steve has been stealing exams before the test.

programme.title: E4 - Part 4
programme.desc: The story begins in 1894, when Baron Pierre de Courbetin announces his intention to stage the first Olympic games of the Modern Era within two years in Athens.

E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E4 - Milton, Cash and Bentley
programme.desc: Celebrate Cash the house donkey’s birthday, then play hide-and-seek with Milton the skunk. Meet Bjornar the beaver, who has a very important job, and explore the importance of cuddles and naps with Bentley the tree kangaroo and his human mum.

programme.title: E2 - Class Reunion
programme.desc: Follow new graduate Beni, who gets an exciting introduction to jungle college alongside former classmates Sura, Meryl, and Wine. Check on new arrival Molly and join Dr. Nadine as she grades slowpoke Bumi and wild child Monita on their latest lessons.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E4 - Milton, Cash and Bentley
programme.desc: Celebrate Cash the house donkey’s birthday, then play hide-and-seek with Milton the skunk. Meet Bjornar the beaver, who has a very important job, and explore the importance of cuddles and naps with Bentley the tree kangaroo and his human mum.

programme.title: E2 - Class Reunion
programme.desc: Follow new graduate Beni, who gets an exciting introduction to jungle college alongside former classmates Sura, Meryl, and Wine. Check on new arrival Molly and join Dr. Nadine as she grades slowpoke Bumi and wild child Monita on their latest lessons.

programme.title: E10 - Europe
programme.desc: From the Highlands to the Alps, Europe’s evocative landscapes are the backdrop for epic wildlife drama. Normally stoic red deer go wild during the rut. Wolf packs clash over territory, and foxes do the foxtrot - it’s not as nice as it sounds.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E5 - Cat Country
programme.desc: Join a group of wildlife scientists tracking the comeback of the ocelot in the Pantanal. Check in on their network of trail cameras, which capture the movements of this elusive spotted cat, and see the perils it faces, including giant anacondas.

programme.title: E8 - Rheas-Cerrado
programme.desc: Every year in the dry season, as the floodwaters disappear, the grasslands of the Pantanal are home to many species: giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rheas- the largest bird in South America.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E3 - Africa

programme.title: E10 - Europe
programme.desc: From the Highlands to the Alps, Europe’s evocative landscapes are the backdrop for epic wildlife drama. Normally stoic red deer go wild during the rut. Wolf packs clash over territory, and foxes do the foxtrot - it’s not as nice as it sounds.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E5 - Cat Country
programme.desc: Join a group of wildlife scientists tracking the comeback of the ocelot in the Pantanal. Check in on their network of trail cameras, which capture the movements of this elusive spotted cat, and see the perils it faces, including giant anacondas.

programme.title: E8 - Rheas-Cerrado
programme.desc: Every year in the dry season, as the floodwaters disappear, the grasslands of the Pantanal are home to many species: giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rheas- the largest bird in South America.

programme.title: E107 - Epic Sail
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island! Blaze and his crew must find the missing pieces of their ship so they can sail home.

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E223 - Granddad Dog's Garage
programme.desc: Peppa's car runs out of petrol but thankfully Granddad Dog's garage isn't far away. With one phone call, Granddad Dog is on his way. He tows Peppa's car back to his garage.

programme.title: E224 - The Balloon Ride
programme.desc: Peppa wins the top prize in a raffle at school: a trip in a hot air balloon. Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig, George and Peppa climb aboard and enjoy the flight until the balloon gets caught in a tree. Luckily, the balloon has landed in a very familiar garden.

programme.title: E225 - George Catches A Cold
programme.desc: Peppa and George love jumping in puddles, even when it's raining – but when George takes off his rain hat, he catches a cold. After a while George is feeling much better. Now he's more than happy to wear his rain hat, even when it's not raining.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E230 - Cuckoo Clock
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock. When a wooden cuckoo pops out singing “Cuckoo!”, Peppa thinks it is very funny, but George has missed the whole thing. George does not want to miss the cuckoo again but the cuckoo only pops out once an hour.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E311 - Pups Save The Polar Bears / A Pup In Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. // When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find the missing sheep.

programme.title: E107 - Mummy Pig At Work
programme.desc: Peppa accidentally crashes Mummy Pig's computer, so Daddy Pig tries to fix it.

programme.title: E111 - Cluc Croc / One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: E228 - Zoe Zebra, The Postman's Daughter
programme.desc: Mr. Zebra the Postman gets help from his daughter Zoe. Zoe has a very special letter for Peppa and George; an invitation to her birthday party. The party is fun, especially as it turns out that Zoe has invited all of Peppa and George's friends.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: L'info du jour[Live]
programme.desc: Un éclairage sur un événement marquant de l'actualité du jour, sélectionné pour sa portée et ses implications. Décrypté avec du recul, il permet de comprendre les enjeux sous-jacents, les conséquences possibles et les dynamiques qui façonnent le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Le JT de la Coupe du monde
programme.desc: Un retour sur les meilleurs moments de la Coupe du monde de football, avec les plus beaux buts et les plus belles actions.

programme.title: Outre-mer
programme.desc: Outre-mer part à la rencontre des habitants des îles d'outre-mer pour explorer leur quotidien. L'émission met en lumière leurs réalités, leurs défis et les problématiques locales, offrant un regard humain et authentique sur ces territoires souvent méconnus.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Dans les hebdos

programme.title: Le JT de la Coupe du monde

programme.title: Le décryptage[Live]

programme.title: E808 - Karaless Whisper / Dollars and Scents
programme.desc: Lincoln and friends try to befriend new girl Kara when they learn she has access to a legendary missing comic book. // Miguel enlists Leni's help when he launches his own perfume line at Reininger's.

programme.title: E809 - Bulking and Sulking / Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: E212 - Lay Lay's Par-Tay-Tay
programme.desc: Determined to make their first party a hit, Lay Lay and Sadie brag to the entire school they've booked the Good Newz Girls to perform. Now all they have to do is make the idea a reality.

programme.title: E256 - SpongeBob in Randomland / SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. // SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why!

programme.title: E222 - New School Who Dis?
programme.desc: After Schwoz's experiment-gone-wrong causes an infestation at Sw.A.G, Danger Force enrolls at Swellview Junior High and stumbles into an extra-curricular crime wave.

programme.title: E513 - Secret Room
programme.desc: Captain Man reveals a 'Crimefighters Only' room in the Man Cave. Jealous, Charlotte, Jasper and Schwoz make a cooler room to show them up. As the gang fights over who gets the better room, things get blown out of proportion.

programme.title: E313 - Wary Gary / Pinned
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to extreme lengths to trick Gary into going to the vet. // SpongeBob become desperate when he accidentally gets pinned under his exercise equipment and must wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: E612 - Time Trap!
programme.desc: When the kids break Mom and Dad's priceless vase, they decide the only thing to do is go back in time to their wedding day, and prevent them from ever receiving it.

programme.title: E101 - Best Summer Ever?
programme.desc: Jack & Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the 'best summer ever.' When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: E262 - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: E108 - Howling Hope / Mar-Smoothie-Lami
programme.desc: Hope makes lots of noise whilst skateboarding, and her howls are heard around the city causing lots of drama. // The Twins manage the Smoothie Bar and the Marsups end up creating the best smoothie ever.

programme.title: E904 - Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The Agenda

Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.desc: Stephen Fry heads back 66 million years, to the apocalyptic end of dinosaur life, and uncovers secrets of the era.

programme.title: E4 - Cycle Of Life
programme.desc: Animals have adapted to survive the hard winter conditions to ensure the future of their species.

programme.desc: Danny Ocean and the gang would have only one reason to pull off their riskiest casino heist - to defend one of their own. But they’re going to need more than luck on their side to break “The Bank.”

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him & his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa & singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color & help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E8 - Calming Colors
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《不良執念清除師》描述高中生「蒲一永」（曾敬驊 飾）遭遇生死邊緣的車禍後陷入昏迷，醒來後意外擁有超能力，原本無聊的生活從此產生翻天覆地的改變，與菜鳥女警官「陳楮英」（宋芸樺 飾），以及校內死對頭「曹光硯」（彭千祐 飾）三人一同展開了一場奇幻又瘋狂的打怪旅程。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: E16 - In Sceaux, With Francois Alu
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at Parc de Sceaux with etoile dancer Francois Alu. On today's menu: a shakshuka.

programme.title: E7 - Peruwelz
programme.desc: Peruwelz, in the Tournaisis region: a rich stop, well worth a visit for its many green and architectural assets. The town, crossed by two canals, is home to many treasures: the Basilica of Our Lady of Bon-Secours, numerous castles and mansions, the Escaut Plains Nature Park.

programme.title: E9 - Paname Takes The Plunge
programme.desc: Paris was built around the Seine: its streets are numbered according to their position in relation to the river. Its coat of arms and motto, 'Fluctuat nec mergitur', refer to water. Immerse yourself in this major element of Parisian life.

programme.title: E5 - Retro Camping
programme.desc: In Calvados, Laurent shares a bit of the daily life of retro campers. From the vehicle to the dishes, everything is vintage! Focus on the Citroen Dyane, overshadowed by the 2 CV, the Renault 9 and a BMW queen of tuning.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E10 - Spices Of The Fenua, An Invitation To Travel
programme.desc: Some spices arrived in Tahiti by chance, along the routes of travel. Others are grown locally. All of them, in any case, play a major role in local cuisine and in recipes passed down from generation to generation.

programme.title: E20 - The Colors Of The Esterel
programme.desc: It is a jewel with the look of a Grand Canyon. 250 million years ago, the volcanic massif of the Esterel separated from Africa when the Mediterranean was forming. Between Cannes and Saint-Tropez, the Esterel covers the south-east of the Var and extends into the Alpes-Maritimes. Cliffs, forests, sea, its landscapes are astonishing...

programme.title: E8 - Bocuse D'or
programme.desc: Christian delves into the world of culinary competition. Chefs Samuel Sirois and Gilles Herzog, Canada's representatives at Bocuse d'Or, share their Olympic-level experience, joined by Hugo Duchesne, Quebec's top sommelier of 2020.
